channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Champions! Leland outlasts Sequoia to capture CCS Division V crown
item.description: CCS Division V championship 2024: Leland's three-headed rushing attack powers Chargers to victory over Sequoia
item.dc:creator: Glenn Reeves, The Mercury News

item.title: Mighty Mariners: Moreau Catholic defense sparks thrilling NCS Division VII championship victory
item.description: 2024 NCS Division VII football championship: Moreau Catholic senior Eriq Fields forces and recovers late Ferndale fumble in 21-19 victory.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: BYU eliminated from Big 12 contention, beats Houston
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU learned it was eliminated from Big 12 Championship Game contention at halftime, but the Cougars still had a job to do. Jake Retzlaff ran for two touchdowns and threw for 167 yards to lead No. 19 BYU to a 30-18 victory over Houston on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Saturday Night Five: How Oregon could win from losing, ASU clinches, Arizona falls, WSU fades and updated bowl math
item.description: The Ducks might be better off losing the Big Ten title game because it would produce an easier path into the CFP semifinals.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Montrose def. Pueblo West 18-7 to advance to the championship game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The Montrose Red Hawks are heading to the Class 4A state championship game after defeating the Pueblo West Cyclones 18-7 in a hard-fought semifinal matchup.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Lou Carnesecca, Hall of Fame coach who led St. John's for 24 seasons, dies at 99
item.description: Lou Carnesecca, the excitable St. John’s coach whose outlandish sweaters became an emblem of his team’s rousing Final Four run in 1985, has died at 99, just a few weeks shy of what would have been his 100th birthday.
item.dc:creator: Mike Fitzpatrick, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: No. 17 Iowa St beats Wildcats 29-21 for first 10-win season, will play Sun Devils for Big 12 title
item.description: Rocco Becht threw for two touchdowns and ran for another and No. 17 Iowa State’s defense came up with big stops in the second half to help the Cyclones beat Kansas State 29-21 for the first 10-win season in program history.
item.dc:creator: Pavle Markovic, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Michigan, Ohio State players brawl after Wolverines beat No. 2 Buckeyes. Police use pepper spray
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — A fight broke out at midfield after Michigan stunned No. 2 Ohio State 13-10 on Saturday when Wolverines players attempted to plant their flag on the OSU logo and were confronted by the Buckeyes.
item.dc:creator: MITCH STACY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Utes women upset #3 Notre Dame, 78-67
item.description: GEORGE TOWN, CAYMAN ISLANDS — The Utah women's basketball team picked up their highest ranked win outside of the Huntsman Center in school history by taking down No. 3 Notre Dame, 78-67, in the final game of the Cayman Island Classic.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Coach of trans SJSU volleyball player blames teams that forfeited for 'appalling, hateful messages' to players
item.description: San Jose State volleyball head coach Todd Kress spoke out against teams that forfeited matches against his team after losing the conference championship.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Jose State's volleyball season that ignited debate over gender in sports ends in MW title match
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — San Jose State's volleyball team, the subject of a national debate about participation in women's sports, was beaten by Colorado State 27-25, 25-20, 23-25, 25-16 in Saturday's Mountain West tournament final, ending the Spartans' season.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 4 Penn State overcomes slow start to beat Maryland 44-7 and advance to Big Ten title game
item.description: STATE COLLEGE, Pa. (AP) — Drew Allar threw for a touchdown and ran for another score as No. 4 Penn State beat Maryland 44-7 Saturday and advanced to its first Big Ten championship game since 2016.
item.dc:creator: TRAVIS JOHNSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Michigan upsets No. 2 Ohio State 13-10 for Wolverines' 4th straight win over bitter rival
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — Dominic Zvada kicked a 21-yard field goal with 45 seconds left and Michigan stunned No. 2 Ohio State 13-10 on Saturday, ending the Buckeyes ’ hopes of returning to the Big Ten title game.
item.dc:creator: MITCH STACY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Syracuse knocks No. 6 Miami out of ACC title game and possibly the playoff with 42-38 win
item.description: Kyle McCord and Syracuse knocked No. 6 Miami out of Atlantic Coast Conference title contention — and possibly ended the Hurricanes' College Football Playoff hopes — by rallying from a 21-0 deficit for a 42-38 win.
item.dc:creator: Mark Frank, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ex-Bears coach Matt Eberflus shares gracious statement after historic firing
item.description: Former Chicago Bears head coach Matt Eberflus issued a gracious statement to the players and fans after being fired Friday in his third season with the team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohio State, Michigan players involved in melee after Buckeyes loss, multiple people pepper sprayed
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) — Michigan players planted their team flag at midfield of Ohio Stadium on Saturday afternoon after a 13-10 win over No. 2 Ohio State, leading to a brawl between players from both teams with police attempting to separate the sides and pepper spray being used.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, NewsNation

item.title: Sellers' 20-yard TD run with 1:08 to go lifts No. 16 South Carolina to 17-14 win over No. 12 Clemson
item.description: LaNorris Sellers' 20-yard TD run with 1:08 to play lifted No. 16 South Carolina to a 17-14 victory over No. 12 Clemson.
item.dc:creator: Pete Iacobelli, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ohio State loses to Michigan for fourth straight year in huge upset; playoff status now up in the air
item.description: The unranked Michigan Wolverines went to Columbus and took down the second-ranked Ohio State Buckeyes for their fourth win in a row in "The Game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Georgia pulls out epic win in 8-overtime thriller, all but clinch spot in College Football Playoff
item.description: Georgia overcame a 14-point deficit with 5:37 left and defeated Georgia Tech in eight overtimes to all but clinch a spot in the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU knocks off NC State in third place game, 72-61
item.description: SAN DIEGO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU got back in the win column with a 72-61 win over NC State on Thursday afternoon at the Rady Children’s Invitational at LionTree Arena in San Diego, Calif.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chiefs recover botched snap by Raiders in closing seconds, clinch playoff berth with 19-17 victory
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — The Kansas City Chiefs have made a habit of winning games in the most improbable of ways. The way they beat the Raiders on Friday still had Patrick Mahomes and Co. shaking their heads in disbelief.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tommy Edman agrees to $74 million, 5-year contract with Dodgers after helping win World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Tommy Edman and the Los Angeles Dodgers agreed Friday to a $74 million, five-year contract. His new deal contains a team option for 2030 and includes $25 million deferred over 10 years. The agreement supersedes a $16.5 million, two-year contract he agreed to with St.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Colorado State advances to MW volleyball final and will take the court against San Jose State
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Colorado State coach Emily Kohan said her team will take the floor rather than become the latest team to forfeit against San Jose State after the top-seeded Rams advanced to the Mountain West volleyball tournament final on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers extend contract of postseason hero
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers have agreed to a contract extension with one of the key pieces of the team's World Series title run. The Dodgers reached agreement Friday on a deal with Tommy Edman, ensuring that the do-it-all utility-man will remain with the team for the foreseeable future.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Shedeur Sanders wins Unitas award, then goes on to break Colorado's single-season passing mark
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — Shedeur Sanders woke up early Friday, won a national award, and then set No. 23 Colorado's all-time single-season passing record.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Caleb Williams still poised to break Bears QB records despite roller coaster rookie season
item.description: Caleb Williams has shown poise and promise as the Chicago Bears quarterback, despite the team's struggles, and is on track to break franchise records for passing yards and touchdowns.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: New York Jets hire 33rd team to assist in hiring process
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- An organizational shift is upon us for the New York Jets. Owner Woody Johnson has hired the 33rd team which was founded by former Jets GM Mike Tannenbaum in 2019, to help aid the Jets search.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Blake Snell and Dodgers agree to $182 million, 5-year contract, AP source says
item.description: Less than a month after winning the World Series, the Los Angeles Dodgers are spending big again to add one of baseball's best pitchers to their star-studded roster.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Los Angeles area grad on life support after suffering head injury in college football game
item.description: A graduate of a Los Angeles County high school is on life support after suffering a serious head injury during a college football game last month. His school had mistakenly announced he had died Tuesday. According to KTLA affiliate WHNT in Huntsville, Alabama, 20-year-old Medrick Burnett Jr.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Chicago hosts Dallas in Central Division play
item.description: Dallas Stars (13-7, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (7-12-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Wednesday, 8:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Dallas Stars visit the Chicago Blackhawks in a matchup within the Central Division Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Wembanyama scores 34 as Spurs beat Jazz, 128-115
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - 17 games into the NBA season, the Utah Jazz and San Antonio Spurs have already played each other four times, and the Jazz have to be glad they don't have to see Victor Wembanyama again this season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
